title: trifolium columbinum var. olivaceum
intro: Trifolium columbinum var. olivaceum is a variety of the lesser clover, a type of perennial herb belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Trifolium columbinum var. olivaceum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various conditions. Trifolium columbinum var. olivaceum is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
